skills.name: design
skills.description: Architecture before code — generate lightweight spec from codebase analysis
skills.author: sixfactors

skills.name: plan
skills.description: Plan a task — write spec to tasks/todo.md, enter plan mode
skills.author: sixfactors

skills.name: test
skills.description: Run tests, parse results, track coverage history
skills.author: sixfactors

skills.name: commit
skills.description: Review + reflect + commit in one flow
skills.author: sixfactors

skills.name: qa
skills.description: Quality gate — run all checks before promoting a task
skills.author: sixfactors

skills.name: deploy
skills.description: Deploy to staging or production with verification gates
skills.author: sixfactors

skills.name: debug
skills.description: Investigate production issues — search logs, check health
skills.author: sixfactors

skills.name: reflect
skills.description: Session-end reflection — capture what you learned
skills.author: sixfactors

skills.name: ship
skills.description: Close the loop — QA, deploy staging, deploy prod, verify, close task
skills.author: sixfactors
